units.source_text: 2 這包括客⼾貸款賬⾯總值68億美元及相關預期信貸損失準備600萬美元，乃與出售法國業務保留住宅和其他零售貸款組合有關，詳情於第329⾴附註23披露。
units.translation_target_text: 2 This includes a total carrying amount of loans to customers of US$6.8 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$6.0 million, related to the sale of the French business' retained residential and other retail loan portfolio, details of which are disclosed in note 23 on page 329.

units.source_text: 2 違責或然率組別並不計及任何管理層判斷調整對預期信貸損失級別或準備的影響，包括尚未正式實施的新模型之影響。有關管理層判斷調整之詳情，請參閱第120
units.translation_target_text: 2 PD groups do not take into account the impact of any adjustments in management judgment on expected credit loss levels or provisions, including the impact of new models that have not yet been formally implemented. For details on management judgment adjustments, please refer to Chapter 120
